findings.description: Jared Howes Munson, born 30 July 1836 in Richfield, New York, was Frederick Curtiss Munson's father.
supporting_sources: New York, New York City Births, 1846-1909 — Frederick's 31 July 1887 Brooklyn birth index names Jared Howes Munson as father.
United States Census, 1900 — Frederick C. Munson, age 13, is recorded as son of household head Jared H. Munson in Brooklyn.

findings.description: Katherine Saguine, born 10 July 1857 in Richmond, New York, was Frederick Curtiss Munson's mother.
supporting_sources: New York, New York City Births, 1846-1909 — Frederick's 31 July 1887 Brooklyn birth index names Kathrine Seguine as mother.
United States Census, 1900 — Frederick C. Munson, age 13, is recorded as son of Cathrine V. Munson in the Jared H. Munson household in Brooklyn.

The FamilySearch tree/API records the same parent profile as Katherine Saguine; treat Seguine/Saquine/Saguine as a documented name-variant question, not as a reason to reject the parent-child evidence.
